name: chr22_22q11_21_LCR22B_breakpoint_cluster
description: LCR22-B, a ~150 kb SD block at chr22:20.0-20.15 Mb (GRCh38). The proximal A-B 'nested' deletion (~1.5 Mb) and atypical A-B duplications use LCR22-B as their distal breakpoint. Contains GGT/BCRL/USP18 paralogs at >99% identity with LCR22-A/C/D modules.

architecture.internal_structure: Shorter LCR22 module with GGT-paralog core; high identity with LCR22-A modules drives A-B NAHR.
